summary: Key discussion signals: Codex encrypts prompts, Amazon agent deleted prod, Grok Build security flaw, Claude Code token overhead, Grok 4.5 launch, Cursor 0day, verification loop boosts DeepSeek, MCP server trust issues. | Official vendor sources show major product releases (Mistral Vibe, JetBrains ReSharper, Google ADK 2.0), security containment (Anthropic, Daytona, AWS GuardDuty), and funding (Daytona $24M, E2B $21M). User workflow signals include Codex usage surge and Fly.io resilience patterns. Research on MCP adoption and agentic code maintenance. Missing social/discussion sources. | Screening of 2026-07-14/15 GitHub OSS releases. Mainstream product updates dominate: GitHub Copilot security, Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Qwen Code, Vercel AI, OpenCode, OpenHands, Cloudflare agents, Browser-use, etc. Notable infra primitives: Headroom (token compression), Omnigent (orchestration), E2B sandbox, Mem0 memory. No user workflow reports in this shard. | Package ecosystem shows strong activity in agent observability, memory, security, and MCP tooling. Key signals: OpenAI Codex CLI update, GitHub Copilot CLI update, Vercel agent eval playground, and multiple agent security/observability tools. User workflow signals are absent from package sources.

candidates.title: Anthropic details agent containment across products
candidates.why_it_matters: Anthropic shares engineering lessons on capping agent blast radius across claude.ai and Claude Code.

candidates.title: Mistral launches Vibe coding agent
candidates.why_it_matters: Mistral releases Vibe agent for terminal, IDE, and background long-horizon work.

candidates.title: AWS Lambda one-click setup for coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: AWS Lambda adds one-click prompt for coding agents, simplifying serverless agent deployment.

candidates.title: Vercel Plugin in VS Code and GitHub Copilot CLI
candidates.why_it_matters: Vercel Plugin now available in VS Code and GitHub Copilot CLI for direct deployments.

candidates.title: Google ADK Go 2.0 with graph-based workflow
candidates.why_it_matters: Google releases ADK Go 2.0 with graph-based workflow engine and human-in-the-loop.

candidates.title: Codex usage up 10x to 7M users
candidates.why_it_matters: Codex usage surges 10x in 6 months to 7M users, overtaking Claude Code.

candidates.title: Daytona raises $24M Series A for agent computers
candidates.why_it_matters: Daytona raises $24M to give every agent a computer, signaling infra demand.

candidates.title: E2B raises $21M Series A for agent sandboxes
candidates.why_it_matters: E2B raises $21M for agent sandbox infrastructure, competing with Daytona and Modal.

candidates.title: JetBrains ReSharper 2026.2 for VS Code and Cursor
candidates.why_it_matters: JetBrains brings ReSharper debugging to VS Code and Cursor, enhancing agent IDE support.

candidates.title: OpenAI outlines agentic era investment strategy
candidates.why_it_matters: OpenAI shares investment approach for agentic era, signaling long-term commitment.

candidates.title: Anthropic shares inside story of Claude Code
candidates.why_it_matters: Anthropic details Claude Code's journey from internal CLI to product.

candidates.title: GPT-5 preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
candidates.why_it_matters: GPT-5 becomes preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot, expanding agent reach.
